tool_args.label: Part of series of ADA projects

payload.claim_text: This Contract is one of a series of ADA projects supporting the MTA's commitment to make stations accessible.
payload.description: The contract is part of a broader MTA ADA accessibility program

payload.claim_text: Funding for the Contract, and stipends for the three unsuccessful proposers, are included in the MNR portion of the MTA's 2020-2024 Capital Program.
payload.description: The contract and stipends are funded through the MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program

payload.claim_text: MLJ offered the best overall value considering the quality of its technical proposal, price, and schedule savings. MLJ was the highest ranked technically.
payload.description: MLJ was selected as the highest ranked proposer and offered best overall value

payload.claim_text: MLJ is committed to meet the required goal requirements and its utilization plan is under review. MLJ has achieved its DBE/MBE/WBE goals on recently completed MTA contracts.
payload.description: MLJ has committed to meeting DBE/MBE/WBE/SDVOB goals

payload.claim_text: None recommended. Currently, MTA lacks available in-house technical personnel to perform the scope of work associated with this Contract.
payload.description: No alternatives to the contract award were recommended due to lack of in-house technical personnel
